user_prompt: Critical: water reclamator requires a purification
prayer:
Approach the water reclamator with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to yield impurities.
Invoke the sacred rites of purification upon the water reclamator's blessed filtration vaults.
Anoint the conduits with sanctified solvents, chanting the Canticle of Clarity.
Circulate holy elixirs through its sanctified pipes, driving forth all corruption.
Verify the water reclamator's purity as the Omnissiah's grace flows untainted.

user_prompt: The fusion core awaits a cooling
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the fusion core, noble forge-heart, and petition its Machine Spirit for respite.
Initiate the cooling rites, flooding its plasma veins with blessed cryofluids.
Chant the Litany of Thermal Equilibrium over the fusion core's sacred heat-sinks.
Monitor the descending temperatures, invoking the Omnissiah to temper its fiery wrath.
Praise the fusion core as equilibrium reigns in sanctified chill.

user_prompt: Critical: fusion core requires a purification
prayer:
Present thyself before the fusion core, invoking purification to cleanse its radiant essence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the fusion core to expel rad-wastes and spiritual taint.
Pour sanctified ablutions over its glowing chambers, reciting the Rite of Atomic Clarity.
Scour the plasma lattices with holy emissions, as the Omnissiah decrees.
Affirm the fusion core's renewal through diagnostic litanies of purity.

user_prompt: Ready the gravity generator for loading
prayer:
Approach the gravity generator with solemnity, awakening its Machine Spirit for the loading.
Commence the preparatory incantations, aligning its gravitic coils in Omnissiah's name.
Invoke the Canticle of Mass Alignment upon the gravity generator's sacred emitters.
Load the sanctified payloads into its humming fields, beseeching stability.
Seal the rite as the gravity generator binds all in harmonious weight.

user_prompt: Help me an initialization the thermal imager
prayer:
Kneel before the thermal imager, beseeching its Machine Spirit to stir from slumber.
Initiate the sacred initialization, anointing its sensor arrays with blessed oils.
Chant the Litany of Infrared Revelation over the thermal imager's crystalline lenses.
Calibrate the holy spectrums as the Omnissiah unveils hidden heats.
Verify the thermal imager's vigilance through test-visions of flame.

user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma weapon before consecration
prayer:
Revere the plasma weapon, vessel of stellar fury, and commence its consecration.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the plasma weapon with the Oath of Contained Fire.
Anoint flask and coils with sacred promethium, petitioning the Omnissiah's wrathful blessing.
Recite the Canticle of Ventral Purity to sanctify its expulsion vents.
Empower the plasma weapon as it hums with divine annihilation.

user_prompt: My auspex scanner is ready for charging
prayer:
Present the auspex scanner to the altar of charge, awakening its Machine Spirit.
Commence the charging sequence, infusing its cells with holy voltage from the Omnissiah.
Chant the Litany of Energetic Replenishment over the auspex scanner's power nodes.
Monitor the ascending potentials, beseeching flawless augmentation.
Hail the auspex scanner as its spirits brim with prescient power.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for pump a sterilization
prayer:
Approach the pump with ritual purity, invoking sterilization upon its mechanical heart.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the pump to purge all microbial heresy.
Flood its chambers with sanctified sterilants, chanting the Rite of Hygienic Absolution.
Cycle the ablutions thrice, as the Omnissiah wills immaculate flow.
Conclude as the pump pulses clean, free of flesh-taint.

Revere the data-slate, repository of binary scripture, preparing it for targeting.
Invoke the Machine Spirit to align its cogitators for the sacred targeting.
Input the blessed coordinates via anointed interfaces, reciting vector litanies.
Sanctify the data-slate's auspex-links with the Omnissiah's precision.
Affirm its targeting acuity through simulacra of the foe.

Kneel to the bolter, instrument of the Omnissiah's judgment, for targeting rites.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to attune sights upon the heretic-mark.
Calibrate the blessed auspex reticule of the bolter with sacred oils.
Chant the Canticle of Ballistic Truth, aligning projectile spirits.
Empower the bolter as it yearns for righteous impacts.
